title: Quit from Game Menu
description: Adds a button to the pause menu to quit the game directly
body:
# Quit from Game Menu
A Minecraft Fabric mod that lets you quickly quit the game from the pause menu instead of having to go to the title screen first  (Worlds are saved when quit)

### Screenshot
![Minecraft screenshot of the pause menu, with a new button with "Quit Game" written on it](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/penpen-uwu/quit-from-game-menu/refs/heads/main/screenshot.png)
(The "Mods" button is unrelated to this mod, it comes from [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).)
